global_summary: This week needs 103 work-days across the nine jobs, but of 75 due by today only 18 are earned and the single due start hasn't begun. Every project missed last week (Jul 13-19). Kyle, Katie and Cockrell sit closest; drive trims, foundations and inspections to recover.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Off this week's plan — the final building inspection due Mon Jul 20 is still undone (Slip: 57%). Book that inspection immediately.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Well behind — only 3 of 27 planned work-days earned this week (Slip: 64%). Get tiles installed by Tue Jul 28.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Barely moving — 1 of 10 planned work-days earned (Slip: 71%). Finish the secret door and pass final building inspection by Fri Jul 24.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Behind this week with none of 8 due work-days earned; 30 of 51 expected done (Slip: 40%). Start the second-floor interior paint change order.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Behind — none of 4 due work-days earned (Slip: 41%). Deliver the insulation energy efficiency report and clear the stalled rough-in inspections.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Behind this week — 1 of 4 due work-days earned; 72 of 92 expected done (Slip: 20%). Start siding by Thu Jul 23 and insulation by Fri Jul 24.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Savable — 7 of 14 due work-days earned (Slip: 33%). Finish plumbing and electrical trim plus countertops by Sat Jul 25.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation stalled — 2 of 5 due work-days earned (Slip: 33%). Pour concrete and start the foundation cure by Fri Jul 24.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Slightly behind — 4 of 5 due work-days earned (Slip: 19%). Start tile install (no backsplash) by Fri Jul 24.
